text:
きみの実力が優れているという話を
相変わらずよく聞くんだよね。

だから私も、ここいらでその実力を
しっかりこの目で見ておきたいんだ。

お願いするのは、ただの
タイムアタックなんだけどね。
そう、目標達成までの時間を競うアレ。

あの演習を、制限時間遵守はもちろん
それなりの評価でクリアしてみせてよ。
ただし難易度はハードで頼むよ？

失敗すればそれまでだけど、成功すれば
記録も残るし報酬も得られる。
きみに損はな

I tell ya, I've heard my fair share of stories
about how great you are.
An unfair share of 'em, even.

So I got to figuring, maybe I should take a
look and see how you do around here with
my own two eyes.

Now, all I'm asking for is another time attack
run, see. You know, the ones where you try
and beat the clock?

Why don't ya go run through one for me? Stick
to the time limit of course, but score yourself
a nice rating! Oh, and do it on Hard this time.

If you mess up, that's that. But if you pull it
off? You'll get yourself a new record and score
some rewards, too. Can't hurt, right?
